title: Detailed steps to simulate the mirror adjustments
author: Zhang, Wen-an
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is part of work for the preprint entitled "1887 Michelson-Morley experiment: a new analysis with computer assistance". 

 In this dataset, the detailed simulation works for the mirror adjustments are presented in the Excel forms and the CAD drawings grouped under the same filenames. The sequential steps for the mentioned trials are described in Section "Pre-description" of the mentioned preprint.
